plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-480 RP16.P00.M00.S01-RP16.P01.M02.S08 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-480 bootstraps the RP16 Governance DLP Retention descriptor program: the program contract (contracts/governance-core-contract.json), the packages/governance package, and the rp16:governance-core:validate gate, covering the full RP16.P00 scope foundation cycle (M00-M10: scope inventory, acceptance gate definition, non-goal boundary, target file map, contract schema outline, ownership note, matter-first trace note, permission baseline note, audit baseline note, synthetic data policy, risk register row, blocked-claim rule, Hermes preflight fields, Claude review prompts, human approval note, closeout handoff, dependency list, downstream RP routing, command matrix, receipt shape) and the RP16.P01 model foundation head (M00-M02: package directory layout, primary entity identifier, tenant scope field, matter trace reference, lifecycle status enum, ownership metadata, reference relationship map, required/optional field registries) as fourteen descriptor-only sections over 150 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H16), Claude review packet (C16), and CP00-481 handoff, without opening governance, DLP, legal hold, or retention runtime or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-480 is a descriptor-only RP16 (Governance DLP Retention) scope-contract-foundation bootstrap covering 150 planned units (RP16.P00.M00.S01-RP16.P01.M02.S08) across fourteen descriptor sections. The pack does not overclaim: manifest.json and command-evidence.json report production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, status=implemented_pending_review, no_real_data=true, writes_product_state=false; the Hermes packet's production_ready_candidate=true is an internal coverage.valid && foundation.valid flag, clearly distinct from the false pack-level gate, so production_ready gates are not weakened. The implementation (packages/governance) is clean, internally consistent ES modules whose GOVERNANCE_CORE_CP480_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION, validators.js, model.test.js, and the rp16 validator comprehensively enforce descriptor-only / no-runtime / no-real-data / deny-cross-tenant boundaries; the validator deepEquals registry constants against contracts/governance-core-contract.json to catch drift. Claude is encoded as a read-only, non-final-approver reviewer (claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, enterprise_trust_not_claimed_from_local_validation=true), and Hermes is used only for a deterministic descriptor evidence packet (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false), not product runtime. Review hardening holds: forbidden_review_evidence enumerates auth failures, zero-byte, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, and missing fields; the readiness auth-preflight passed with valid non-empty JSON (exit 0, stderr 0); invalid_attempts_preserved is empty; and the unrelated docs/ldip-integration c-ldip-01-invalid-attempt file is correctly classified as an unrelated dirty file, not pack scope. Plan entry, baseline, contract, registry, README, and manifest all agree on 150 units / 14 sections / deliverable distribution (impl 108, contract 8, security_audit 16, hermes_evidence 7, claude_review 3, ui 8), and ui:8 cross-checks against the P01 sections. Post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json, raw-output.json, review-receipt.json) are forward-referenced and not yet present, which is expected since this read-only review precedes them. One cosmetic P3: a generated review-packet question string overstates section scope versus the canonical fourteen sections; no gating effect. No P0/P1/P2. Implementation and plan gates support pack closeout; final human approval and enterprise-trust closure remain outside this read-only review.

findings.title: Generated Claude review-packet question text overstates section scope (cosmetic, non-gating)
findings.details: createGovernanceCoreCp480ClaudeReviewPacket emits a question describing 'the twenty-one descriptor sections (P00 M00-M10 scope foundation cycle and P01 M00-M08 model foundation cycle ... validation helper, fixture model, serialization shape, public export, model tests, Hermes model summary, Claude model review prompt ...)'. CP00-480 actually covers fourteen descriptor-only sections (P00 M00-M10 plus P01 M00-M02; last unit RP16.P01.M02.S08), the canonical count enforced by validateGovernanceCoreCp480ScopeContractFoundationDescriptor and asserted as section_count===14 in both packages/governance/test/model.test.js and scripts/validate-rp16-governance-core-contract.mjs, and stated correctly as 'fourteen descriptor-only sections' in README.md and the manifest implementation_summary. The 'twenty-one'/'P01 M00-M08' wording is anticipatory text for the eventual full RP16 model-foundation cycle and is mirrored by several unused GOVERNANCE_CORE_CP480_ROW_EXTRAS keys (validation_helper, fixture_model, serialization_shape, public_export, model_unit_test, invalid_reference_test, ownership_drift_test, hermes_model_summary, claude_model_review_prompt) that no current required_section_rows title references. The string is descriptive content inside a generated review-packet object and has no gating effect: it is not consumed by the validator and not consumed by the actual Claude review (which uses prompt.txt).
findings.recommendation: Align the embedded question text with the actual CP00-480 scope (e.g., 'fourteen descriptor-only sections: P00 M00-M10 and P01 M00-M02'), or explicitly mark it as describing the eventual full RP16 cycle. Optionally prune or annotate the currently-unused ROW_EXTRAS entries. No functional change required for closeout.
findings.post_review_disposition: Non-blocking P3. Canonical counts (14 sections / 150 rows) are correct and enforced everywhere that gates closeout; does not affect pack closeout or goal closeout.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-480 governance core scope contract foundation descriptor pack
